Zr oxide samples. Enriched 91.1 and 97.7 % for Zr-91
and Zr-90 respectively. Thickness between 1.5 and
4 mg/cm2 onto thick aluminum backing.
Neutron flux was monitored by counting the recoil
protons from a polyethylene foil 66.6 mg/cm-2 thick
with a thin Cs-I(Tl) scintillator counter
2 MeV energy beam
The tritium content of the 3H-Ti target, 0.9
mg/cm2 thick, on a copper  support, was ~4 Ci.
Direct detection of alpha particles from (n,a) reaction
alpha spectra were measured at seven angles varying
from 24.5 to 157 degrees with an angular resolution
of about +- 16 degrees.
The neutron flux was monitored by counting
the recoil protons from a polyethylene foil 66.6
mg/cm2 thick with a thin CsI(Tl) scintillator counter.
The alpha energy was measured by silicon
surface barrier detector
No information is available.
The accuracy in determining neutron fluence is
estimated to be about 6%.
. The energy resolution due to neutron energy spread,
alpha energy loss, geometrical conditions and counter
energy resolution was estimated to vary from
400 to 600 keV(FWHM).
VOF.- Main lab code and facility corrected

Cosmetic changes and corrections.
Experimental details were added.

angle integrated spectra of alpha particles.
Cross-section integrated in the 17.0 - 21.0 MeV energy
range is equal to 5.15 +- 0.16 mb.
Data taken from priv.comm.Turkiewicz 3 Nov.1988
It corresponds to fig.1 from Phys.Rev.C34(1986)2065.
